metadata.description: Deployment environment name used for naming and tagging (dev/prod).
Project short name used in resource naming.
Container image for the Rust API in Container Apps.
Deploy Azure Front Door for global edge caching and WAF (optional for MVP, recommended for production).
Front Door origin host name. Required if deployFrontDoor is true.
List of container apps to deploy.
Role definition ID for PostgreSQL scope assignment. Defaults to Contributor.
Tags applied to all supported resources.

resources.name: [parameters('keyVaultName')]
resources.properties: [union(createObject('tenantId', parameters('tenantId'), 'enableRbacAuthorization', true(), 'enabledForDeployment', false(), 'enabledForTemplateDeployment', false(), 'enabledForDiskEncryption', false(), 'publicNetworkAccess', 'Enabled', 'sku', createObject('name', 'standard', 'family', 'A')), if(parameters('enableSoftDelete'), createObject('enableSoftDelete', true(), 'softDeleteRetentionInDays', 90), createObject('enableSoftDelete', false())))]

metadata.description: The name of the Azure Container Registry
The SKU of the container registry

resources.name: [guid(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('resourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', parameters('acrName')), extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('resourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', last(split(parameters('uamiId'), '/'))), 'AcrPull')]

metadata.description: Principal ID to assign the role to
Role definition ID for PostgreSQL scope. Defaults to Contributor.
Name of the Azure OpenAI account
Location for the Azure OpenAI account
SKU name for the Azure OpenAI account
Name of the Azure OpenAI account
Name of the Cognitive Services account
Principal ID to assign the role to
Role definition ID - Cognitive Services OpenAI User: 5e0bd9bd-7b93-4f28-af87-19fc36ad61bd

configuration.dapr: [if(parameters('app').daprEnabled, createObject('appId', parameters('app').appName, 'appPort', parameters('app').targetPort, 'appProtocol', 'http', 'enableApiLogging', true(), 'enabled', parameters('app').daprEnabled, 'logLevel', 'info'), null())]
